issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay', not 'Activated'. The effect is triggered when the card is played.
Condition is missing. Should check 'HasCardOnBoard' or equivalent to verify opponent has 5+ DON!! on field. Current condition 'Always' does not enforce the opponent DON!! requirement.
Duration '[Your Turn]' text in card requires 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. The effect should last during this turn only.
